description: Developed and maintained internal web applications to support hospital operations across medical and non-medical departments.
Designed and implemented interactive dashboards, reporting systems, and data visualization tools to support data-driven decision-making.
Built and maintained integrations between hospital information systems (his), electronic medical records (EMR), insurance platforms, and internal business applications.
Created applications integrated with his databases, insurance systems, doctor fee management systems, and third-party apis using Laravel, Node.js (Express.js), JavaScript, and Microsoft SQL server.
Designed, optimized, and maintained complex SQL queries, stored procedures, and database structures for reporting and operational requirements.
Supported his and EMR systems, including application development, troubleshooting, database administration, and performance optimization.
Implemented and maintained WhatsApp gateway solutions for internal notifications and automated business processes using Express.js and baileys.
Managed application deployment, configuration, and maintenance on windows server environments utilizing NGINX, xampp, laragon, and iis.
Built and maintained CI/CD pipelines to automate application integration, testing, deployment, and release processes.
Performed application upgrades, bug fixing, troubleshooting, and production support to ensure system reliability and availability.
Collaborated with stakeholders, department heads, and end users to gather requirements and deliver business-focused technology solutions.
Assisted in infrastructure and system administration tasks, including server configuration, domain integration, SSL implementation, and SQL server connectivity management.
Designed E-Commerce system and database architecture.
Created features such as wishlist, cart, checkout, product variants, product purchasing, and admin dashboard, along with REST APIs for front-end use.
Integrated Payment Gateway (Midtrans Snap UI & Core UI) and GoSend API for transaction processing, including UAT with GoSend.
Developed dynamic Web View application using Kotlin.
Updated dependencies and resolved update conflicts.
Reviewed team's pull requests for code quality and consistency.
Provided consultation on application flow and design.
Designed system flow and database architecture.
Developed applications according to specifications.
Trained clients on application usage.
Reviewed and implemented client-requested changes following best practices.
Deployed applications to production environment.
Resolved issues with optimal solutions.
Designed an inventory application using Express.js and React.js.
Integrated oAuth 2.0 authentication system into the application.
Developed custom input forms as per user requirements.
Entered and updated product specifications data in e-commerce web design using SQLite.
Edited product image assets using Photoshop to match web design.
